title: Two-Person Business Looking For Help Building Work OS
excerpt:

posts.author: islandbusiness2021 (Taira Alabi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

We are a small service based business based in Pacific Northwest in the U.S.

We are looking for some help managing the workflow of our communication-based business in Monday.

The service we provide is matching our clients with vendors so we mainly operate quickly via email.

We are looking for immediate help in the short term to get some relief as we are swamped and things keep falling through the cracks but would like to build out a full-scale long term solution after we get things more organized.

If you know anyone who could be a good fit and is willing to work with two entrepreneurs trying to scale from the entrepreneurship phase, please let me know.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @islandbusiness2021 and welcome to the community! We would love the opportunity to discuss this further with you to see how we can assist. Feel free to reach out to me directly via info@greenllamas.com or DM me here.

Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!
Take care
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! We are a small team that is passionate about monday.com. If you’d like to do a one-hour intro call with us to talk more about your needs, send an email to jenna@iointegration.com and we will get something on the calendar. Thank you!!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @islandbusiness2021 - Welcome to the community! We help businesses of all sizes and stages of growth and would love to connect with you to learn more about your business and see how we can best assist. We have built out several vendor-related workflows and systems in monday․com, including a searchable vendor directory for vendors who honor preferred pricing on selected products.

If you would like an introductory call to see if Polished Geek is the right fit for your situation, you can book one here: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @islandbusiness2021,

Welcome to the monday.com community! I work with CarbonWeb and we look to partner with companies as we dive into their solution component-by-component. I’d be interested in learning more about your current usage and the goals you have for your monday.com environment.

There are a lot of great partners in the community but if you would like to schedule with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @islandbusiness2021

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in helping business’s maximise the power of their monday account, as well as building custom integrations, range of various workflows and app to make them even more powerful.

Please book in a complimentary session here.

We look forward to working with your two entrepreneurs to achieve the most out of monday.com

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
